changes.check: 2A — Backend analysis start requires hard auth (not optional)
changes.citation: backend/app/routes/analysis.py line 81: auth_user: CurrentUser = Depends(require_analysis_submitter) — hard auth dependency on POST /api/analysis/start. frontend/app/page.tsx lines 55,167: landing CTAs both link to /upload with no auth gate or sign-in prompt. frontend/app/(app)/analysis/[id]/page.tsx lines 1-8: renders 'Analysis {params.id}' heading and 'Detailed biomarker analysis will appear here.' — no data fetching, no result display, no real implementation. Route role ambiguity vs /results?analysis_id= is real.

frontend/app/upload/page.tsx line 241: user_id: questionnaireData?.user_id || '5029514b-f7fd-4dff-8d60-4fb8b7f90dd4' — hardcoded UUID fallback. Fixing this (sourcing from auth state) is in-scope for auth-journey truthfulness. Removing deprecated tabs is Phase B / OUT OF SCOPE.
